message:
security(report): Escape JSON data to prevent XSS in generated HTML

The report generator embedded JSON data directly into script tags
without escaping characters that have special meaning in HTML/JS.
An attacker could craft process names containing </script> sequences
to break out of the JSON context and inject arbitrary JavaScript.

Add json_script_escape() that converts:
- < → \u003c (prevents </script> injection)
- > → \u003e (prevents tag injection)
- & → \u0026 (prevents entity injection)
- U+2028/U+2029 → \u2028/\u2029 (prevents JS line terminator issues)

Apply escaping to all data serialized into inline <script> blocks.
Add test coverage for the </script> injection vector.

This follows OWASP recommendations for safe JSON embedding in HTML.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
